goal: polynomial_quotient_coeff(p, a, n) = coeff_quotient(p.coeff, a, n)

polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n) + (x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n)
R.0 + (x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n) = (x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, n)

proof: function(x0: R) { coeff_mul_x_minus_a(polynomial_quotient_coeff(p, a, n), a, x0, n) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) }(x)

goal: polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n, q) = forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, x0, n) }

goal: exists(k0: Nat -> R) { k0 = q and polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n, k0) }

goal: exists(k0: Nat -> R) { polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n, k0) }
proof: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Polynomial[T0], x1: T0, x2: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat -> T0) { polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2, k0) } = polynomial_divisible_by_x_minus_a_bound[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](p, a, n)

goal: polynomial_x_minus_a_witness_bound(p, a, n, q) = forall(x0: R) { polynomial_eval_bound(p, x0, n) = coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, x0, n) }

goal: coeff_mul_x_minus_a(q, a, a, n) = coeff_eval(q, a, n) * (a - a)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.0 = T0.0 }[R](coeff_eval(q, a, n))

goal: polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, m) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, m) + (x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, m)
polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, m) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n)
polynomial_eval_bound(p, x, m) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n) + (x - a) * polynomial_quotient_eval_bound(p, a, x, m)
polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, m) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n)
polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, m) = polynomial_eval_bound(p, a, n)
